caption: A formal presentation takes place on a stage before an audience. The backdrop consists of a white wall featuring a repeating pattern of a circular logo and the text "INSTITUTE OF PEACE". On the left side of the stage, a man in a light-colored blazer and dark trousers stands behind a wooden podium, gesturing with his hands. To the right, another man wearing a dark suit and tie sits in a black chair, listening. A blue flag with a white emblem stands to the far left. In the foreground, the backs of the heads of many audience members are visible. As the sequence progresses, the standing man remains behind the podium while the seated man shifts his posture slightly, leaning forward and adjusting his position in the chair. The lighting and camera angle remain consistent across the scene.
